message:
feat(beads): add 15 improvement epics with 54 tasks and dependencies

Create comprehensive beads for NTM improvement ideas:

Epics (15 total):
- P1: ntm init, Session Recovery, CM Integration, Context Management, File Reservation
- P2: Agent Communication, BV Assignment, Output Archive, Cost Estimation, Smart Staggering,
      Handoff Protocol, Session Templates, Session Summarization
- P3: Prompt History, Effectiveness Scoring

Each epic has detailed tasks with acceptance criteria, technical notes, and scope.
Inter-epic dependencies established for proper execution order.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -11,8 +11,6 @@ daemon.log
 daemon.pid
 bd.sock
 sync-state.json
-daemon-error
-.sync.lock
 last-touched
 
 # Local version tracking (prevents upgrade notification spam after git ops)
@@ -34,6 +32,11 @@ beads.left.meta.json
 beads.right.jsonl
 beads.right.meta.json
 
+# Sync state (local-only, per-machine)
+# These files are machine-specific and should not be shared across clones
+.sync.lock
+sync_base.jsonl
+
 # NOTE: Do NOT add negation patterns (e.g., !issues.jsonl) here.
 # They would override fork protection in .git/info/exclude, allowing
 # contributors to accidentally commit upstream issue databases.
